title: Standard-Model gauge couplings and unification
statement: The gauge couplings $g_1,g_2,g_3$ (equivalently $\alpha_{\rm EM}$, $\alpha_s$, $\sin^2\theta_W$) and the unification scale are fixed by the TECT lattice/defect structure and the SO(10) normalisation.
scope: OPEN scaffold. Gauge-coupling values, running, and unification (pillar P6; ROADMAP Stage-5; GAP-3 constants firewall). Each number must carry a DERIVED/MATCHED/INSERTED/PREDICTED label.
falsifier: A derived coupling incompatible with its measured value beyond the stated error once the input set is frozen (GAP-3).
no_overclaim: No coupling is currently PREDICTED; registering the claim does not constitute a derivation.
next_action: Fix the SO(10) coupling normalisation at the unification scale and run to $M_Z$; compare $\sin^2\theta_W$, $\alpha_s$.
